column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a technique of machine learning using a convolutional neural network according to practical computational cost and security levels required by users.SOLUTION: A machine learning device comprises a data acquisition part for acquiring image data, and a machine learning calculation part executing calculation processing using a convolutional neural network based on the image data, where the convolutional neural network consists of a plurality of layers. The machine learning calculation part includes a cryptographic processing part for calculating in a cryptographic execution area by homomorphic encryption, a plain text processing part for calculating in a plain text execution area, and a reception part for receiving layer designation information for designating an N-th layer, the layer halfway from an input layer toward an output layer of the convolutional neural network. The cryptographic processing part executes calculation from the input layer to the N-th layer, and the plain text processing part executes calculation from an (N+1)th layer to the output layer.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 7

column13: To provide a machine learning apparatus using a convolutional neural network in consideration of security, and provide a machine learning system, a machine learning method, and a machine learning program.SOLUTION: A machine learning system is configured by connecting a machine learning apparatus to a terminal device over a network so as to communicate with each other, the machine learning apparatus 100 including: a data acquisition unit 131 which acquires image data; and a machine learning calculation unit 132 which performs calculation processing using a convolutional neural network on the basis of the image data. The machine learning calculation unit includes: a cryptographic processing unit 1322 which executes arithmetic processing in a cryptography execution area using homomorphic encryption; a deciphering unit 1323 which executes arithmetic processing in a deciphering execution area; a shared memory to be accessed by the cryptographic processing unit and the deciphering unit; and a receiving unit 1321 which receives layer designation information to designate an N-th layer which is an intermediate layer between an input layer and an output layer of the convolutional neural network.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 3

column13: Provided is machine learning technology using a convolutional neural network, in accordance with a practical calculation cost and security level desired by a user. A machine learning device comprises a data acquisition unit that acquires image data, and a machine learning calculation unit that performs calculation processing using a convolutional neural network on the basis of the image data, wherein: the convolutional neural network is made up of a plurality of layers; the machine learning calculation unit has an encrypted processing unit that computes in an encryption execution region based on homomorphic encryption, a plain text processing unit that computes in a plain text execution region, and a reception unit that receives layer indicating information indicating an Nth layer, which is a layer en route from an input layer of the convolutional neural network to an output layer; the encrypted processing unit executes computation from the input layer to the Nth layer; and the plain text processing unit executes computation from the N+1th layer to the output layer.

column13: Provided with a technology of a machine learning using a convolutional neural network depending on practical calculation cost and security level desired by a user. column12: Shell of learning machine and learning machine
column13: The utility model discloses a learning machine shell and a learning machine, the learning machine shell comprises a rear shell, the rear shell comprises a bottom plate extending along the horizontal direction and a rear panel obliquely arranged along the vertical direction, the bottom plate and the rear panel are connected and arranged at an acute angle, the upper surface of the bottom plate is provided with a connecting pipeline penetrating to the lower surface of the bottom plate, and the connecting pipeline is connected with the rear panel. An included angle of 0-60 degrees is formed between the axis of the connecting pipeline and the bottom plate; the front shell comprises a top plate extending in the horizontal direction and a front panel obliquely arranged in the vertical direction, the front panel and the top plate are connected and arranged at an obtuse angle, a connecting part in butt joint with the connecting pipeline is convexly arranged on the inner surface, away from the top plate, of the front panel, and the side, away from the front panel, of the top plate is connected with the upper end of the rear panel; the connecting part is fixedly connected with the connecting pipeline through a connecting piece so that the lower end of the front panel can be fixedly connected with the end, away from the rear panel, of the bottom plate. Compared with the prior art, according to the utility model, through the setting, the purpose of conveniently assembling the shell of the learning machine is achieved.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM, MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: Provided are a machine learning system, a machine learning device, and a machine learning method for performing machine learning of a correlation between behavior of a person and the environment surrounding the person so as to promote shift from behavior of the person to a target behavior. The present technology provides a machine learning system provided with at least: a state acquisition unit that at least acquires state information concerning behavior of a person; an evaluation unit that evaluates environment information concerning the environment surrounding the person at the time of acquisition of the state information and the state information so as to obtain a value function; and a machine learning classifier that, in order to encourage shift of behavior to a target behavior, performs reinforcement learning of the value function and selects the environment information when the value function become the highest.

column13: A machine learning device wherein a recurrent neural network has an input layer, an intermediate layer, and an output layer, weights assigned to the respective edges linking intermediate nodes are fixed at a predetermined size, and the machine learning device carries out an output data generation process and a weight updating process every time the input layer receives input data of one or more dimensions in a predetermined sequence. The weight updating process is a process for calculating a Kalman gain matrix in an ensemble Kalman filter method on the basis of two or more estimation weight vectors having mutually different components and a predicted output vector calculated for each of the two or more estimation weight vectors, and updating the weights assigned to the respective edges linking the intermediate nodes and an output node, on the basis of the calculated Kalman gain matrix.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning device using a recurrent neural network having an input layer, an intermediate layer and an output layer, in which the weight assigned to each of edges connecting intermediate nodes to each other is fixed at a predetermined value. The machine learning device performs an output data generation process and a weight updating process every time the input layer receives input data of one or more dimensions in a predetermined order. The weight updating process is a process for calculating the Kalman gain matrix of the ensemble Kalman filter, on the basis of two or more estimated weight vectors of mutually different components and a predicted output vector that is calculated for every two or more estimated weight vectors, and updating, on the basis of the calculated Kalman gain matrix, the weight assigned to each of edges connecting the intermediate nodes and an output node.

column12: Machine learning system, machine learning apparatus, and machine learning method
column13: A machine learning system, a machine learning apparatus, and a machine learning method are provided for machine learning a correlation between a behavior of a person and an environment around the person in order to facilitate a transition from the behavior of the person to a target behavior. The present technology provides a machine learning system provided with at least: a state acquisition unit that acquires at least state information on a behavior of a person; an evaluation unit that evaluates environment information and state information on an environment around the person when the state information is acquired so as to obtain a value function; and a machine learning classifier performing reinforcement learning on the value function and selecting the environmental information when the value function is the highest in order to encourage a transition of the behavior to the target behavior.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: Provided is a machine learning device that continuously learns new classes, the number of which is smaller than that of base classes. A feature extraction unit (10) uses weightings, which have been learned on the basis of divided features of input data, to extract the features of the input data. A base class classification unit (20) classifies base classes on the basis of the features of the input data. A new class classification unit (40) classifies new classes on the basis of the features of the input data. An attention attractor unit (30) normalizes the weights of the base classes and the weights of the new classes.

column13: To provide a machine learning technique for improving classification accuracy by using a graph model on which pseudo-continual learning has been effectively performed.SOLUTION: A machining learning device that continuously learns data of a new class that is smaller in an amount than data of a basic class. The machine learning device comprises: a characteristics extraction unit 51 that is trained in advance with basic-class data, receives data 20 of a new class as input, and outputs a characteristic vector of the new-class data 20; a weight calculation unit 52 that calculates classification weight of the new class on the basis of the characteristic vector; and a graph model 53 that receives the calculated classification weight of the new class and the classification weight of all classes previously learned as pieces of input, outputs reconstructed classification weight 54 by adapting the input classification weight for reconstruction, performs pseudo-continual-learning of other data of the basic class generated on the basis of multiple pieces of data of the basic class, and meta-learns a dependency relationship between the basic class and the new class.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 4

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: A feature extraction unit (10) extracts a feature of input data and generates a feature map. A prototype generation unit (12) accepts the feature map as input and outputs a prototype of features of a class. A basic class classification unit (20) accepts the feature map from the input data as input and classifies the input data into a basic class on the basis of a weight in basic class classification. A new class classification unit (40) accepts the feature map from the input data as input and classifies the input data into a new class on the basis of a weight in new class classification. A combined classification unit (50) accepts the prototype and the feature map from the input data as input and classifies the input data into a class on the basis of a weight in combined classification that combines the weight in basic class classification, which is adjusted on the basis of a metamodel, and the weight in new class classification.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning technique that makes it possible to improve the accuracy of class classification.SOLUTION: A new class image generation unit 61 processes an image of a basic class and generates an image of a new class. An image feature amount output unit 62 is learned in advance by the image of the basic class, and outputs image feature amounts by using the image of the basic class or the image of the new class as an input. A language classification weight output unit 65 is learned in advance by the image of the basic class and a sentence explaining the image of the basic class, and outputs a language classification weight by using the sentence explaining the image of the basic class as an input. An image classification weight output unit 64 calculates an average value of the image feature amounts for each class by using the image feature amounts as an input, and outputs the result as an image classification weight for each class. An optimization unit 66 optimizes the image classification weight by using the image classification weight and the language classification weight as inputs, and outputs a reconstruction classification weight.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 7

column12: MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE
column13: To improve the generalization performance.SOLUTION: A storing unit 11 stores a first inference result corresponding to each of a plurality of face images output by a first model 20 that outputs the first inference result in response to an input of the face image. A processing unit 12 selects, from among the plurality of face images, a first face image 31 and a second face image 32 the distances of which according to the first inference results 41 and 42 exceed a threshold. The processing unit 12 executes, using a third face image 51 obtained by synthesizing the first face image 31 with the second face image 32, the machine learning of a second model 60 that outputs a second inference result in response to an input of the face image.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning technology with which it is possible to reduce fatal oblivion.SOLUTION: Embedment conversion units 20, 50 convert embedment outputted by a neural network into a first embedding matrix and a second embedding matrix. A regularization loss calculation unit 80 calculates a regularization loss on the basis of a first embedding matrix derived by converting the embedment outputted by the neural network to be trained, a first embedding matrix derived by converting the embedment outputted by a trained neural network, a second embedding matrix derived by converting the embedment outputted by the neural network to be trained, and a second embedding matrix derived by converting the embedment outputted by the trained neural network. A metric loss calculation unit 70 calculates the metric loss of the neural network to be trained. An optimization unit 90 optimizes the neural network to be trained on the basis of the metric loss and the regularization loss.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: To provide a machine learning program, a machine learning method, and a machine learning device that improve the learning efficiency of machine learning.SOLUTION: A machine learning program causes a computer to execute processing of causing each of multiple machine learning processes to execute separate machine learning by the same machine learning model, storing data after execution of first processing in each machine learning process in a shared memory accessible by each machine learning process, and causing the second machine learning process other than the first machine learning process in the multiple machine learning processes to execute the second processing related to the first machine learning process on the basis of the first data after execution of the first processing related to the first machine learning process stored in the shared memory when an abnormality occurs during execution of the second processing which is executed after the first processing in the first machine learning process in the machine learning processes.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 4

column13: To efficiently perform deep learning.SOLUTION: The machine learning system is configured to, by using a plurality of inter-layer parameter sets covering inter-layer parameters between at least two layers, perform crossover processing for replacing inter-layer parameters in the plurality of inter-layer parameter sets by predetermined units to generate a plurality of new inter-layer parameter sets, and to perform selection processing for selecting inter-layer parameter sets inherited to the next generation from among the plurality of inter-layer parameter sets obtained by the crossover processing, and to perform change processing (averaging or the like) for changing the inter-layer parameters without depending on the crossover processing, and to repeat the processing for generating the plurality of inter-layer parameter sets of the next generation from the plurality of the inter-layer parameter sets by the crossover processing, the selection processing and the change processing (averaging or the like) to optimize the inter-layer parameters. Thus, it is possible to efficiently perform deep learning.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: The present invention causes a computer to execute processes for: generating a plurality of pieces of changed data obtained by using a generation model to continuously change a specific attribute; determining whether the specific attribute is a discrete attribute or a continuous attribute; determining, when the specific attribute is determined to be a discrete attribute, error weights for a plurality of outputs, which are respectively obtained by inputting the plurality of pieces of changed data to a machine learning model, such that an error weight for a second output corresponding to no discrete boundary of the outputs is smaller than an error weight for a first output corresponding to the discrete boundary of the outputs; and training the machine learning model on the basis of a loss function including the determined error weights.

column13: To provide a machine learning technique capable of improving classification accuracy and memory use efficiency in incremental learning that combines an initial session for performing clustering of a base class with an additional session for performing clustering of a new class.SOLUTION: A feature extraction unit 10 extracts a feature vector of an input sample using a learned model. A clustering unit 40 performs clustering of the input sample based on a feature vector of the input sample and a class to which the input sample belongs to generate a per-class centroid. The clustering unit 40 discriminates a parameter used in clustering between an initial session for clustering a sample of a training data set of a base class used in generating a learned model and an additional session for clustering a sample of a training data set of a new class to be newly added.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

column13: A full-size training image is reduced by an image reduction unit (11) and input to an FCN (Fully Convolutional Neural Network) computation unit (13), and the FCN computation unit (13) performs calculation under a set filter coefficient and outputs a reduced label image. The reduced label image is enlarged to a full size by an image enlargement unit (14), the error calculation unit (15) calculates an error between the enlarged label image and a full-size ground truth based on a loss function, and the parameter update unit (16) updates a filter coefficient depending on the error. By repeating learning under the control of the learning control unit 17, it is possible to generate a learning model for performing optimal segmentation including an error generated at the time of image enlargement. Further, by including the image enlargement processing in the learning model, a full-size label image can be output, and the accuracy evaluation of the model can also be performed with high accuracy.

column13: To perform machine learning in which a relationship of a plurality of attributes included in learning target data is considered.SOLUTION: A learning apparatus receives time-series data that has a plurality of items and that has a plurality of records corresponding to a calendar. The learning apparatus generate tensor data which is made to be a tensor having calendar information and each of the plurality of items as alternative dimensions from the time-series data. The learning apparatus performs deep learning of a neural network and learning of a tensor decomposition method for a learning model input into the neural network by performing tensor decomposition of the tensor data as input tensor data.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 5

The core tensor calculation unit (11) has a mode multiplication unit (31) and a concatenation unit (32). column13: To provide a machine learning device capable of automatically optimizing a parameter of a learning model while considering relationship of data among classes.SOLUTION: A machine learning device 1 which learns a classification model by using a first set classified as a majority class and a second set classified as a minority class comprises: an initialization section 11 for initializing a parameter of a first function that outputs the probability that input data belongs to the minority class and a parameter of a second function that converts data in the second set; a first update section 13 for updating a parameter of the first function so as to maximize an evaluation value with a data constellation randomly selected from the first set and a data constellation randomly selected from the second set and converted with the second function; and a second update section 14 for updating a parameter of the second function so as to minimize the evaluation value with the same data constellation as that of the first update section 13. The device alternately and repetitively activates the first update section 13 and the second update section 14 and then outputs the updated first function as a classification model.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: Concept drift occurs during the operation of an AI system, resulting in a decrease in accuracy of the machine learning model. Therefore, there is a method to maintain accuracy by training each layer of the machine learning model separately and decreasing the learning rate slowly and gently to keep up with the concept drift. However, conventional methods train only some specific layers, which may result in an inability to sufficiently maintain the accuracy of the machine learning model. This machine learning program causes a computer to perform a process for: acquiring, when inference is performed using a trained neural network model, the degree of contribution of each of a plurality of neurons included in the neural network model to the prediction; and on the basis of the degrees of contribution, re-training the neural network without updating the weights of neurons, among the plurality of neurons, the degrees of contribution of which meet a prescribed criterion. Thus, it is possible to suppress degradation in accuracy of the neural network model.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning technique which can suppress deterioration of classification performance after a basic class classification device is connected to a new class classification device.SOLUTION: A feature extraction part 10 extracts a feature of input data, and generates a feature map. A prototype generation part 12 inputs the feature map, and outputs a prototype that is a feature of a class. A basic class classification part 20 inputs the feature map of the input data and classifies the input data into a basic class, on the basis of weight of the basic class classification. A new class classification part 40 inputs the feature map of the input data, and classifies the input data into a new class on the basis of weight of new class classification. A combination classification part 50 inputs the prototype and the feature map of the input data, and classifies the input data into the class on the basis of weight of combination classification in which the weight of the basic class classification adjusted on the basis of a meta model and the weight of the new class classification are combined.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

column12: MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE
column13: A machine learning apparatus inputs pieces of data to a machine learning model, and acquires prediction results of the pieces of data. The machine learning apparatus generates one or more pieces of data based on first data of which the prediction result indicates a first group among the pieces of data. The machine learning apparatus executes clustering of the pieces of data and the one or more pieces of data based on features of the pieces of data and the one or more pieces of data, which are obtained based on a parameter of the machine learning model. The machine learning apparatus updates the parameter of the machine learning model based on training data including the pieces of data and the one or more pieces of data for which results of the clustering are used as ground truth labels.

column13: To suppress execution time of machine learning from becoming excessive.SOLUTION: A machine learning program is configured: to calculate estimated execution time of machine learning using analysis target data from the size of analysis target data and the amount of hardware resources available for the machine learning based on the correspondence information that indicates the correspondence between the set of the size of data and the amount of hardware resources and the execution time; to determine the allowable data size so that the estimated execution time is equal to or less than the threshold value based on the correspondence information when the estimated execution time is larger than the threshold value; and to extract some data from the analysis target data and execute the machine learning on some data based on the allowable data size.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 11

column12: MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE
column13: To suppress occurrence of degradation in retraining of a machine learning model.SOLUTION: A plurality of pieces of fourth data among a plurality of pieces of third data, and a plurality of pieces of fifth data associated with the fourth data among a plurality of pieces of second data are selected, on the basis of difference between an output value of a first machine learning model with respect to data included in the plurality of pieces of third data, and a value of a correct label corresponding to the data included in the plurality of pieces of third data, and the difference between the output value of the first machine learning model with respect to each of the plurality of pieces of third data and the output value of the first machine learning model with respect to each of a plurality of pieces of second data. A second machine learning model is generated by identifying and updating a plurality of second parameters among a plurality of first parameters included in the first machine learning model, on the basis of a numerical value calculated during forward-propagation and the numerical value calculated during inverse-propagation when inputting the plurality of pieces of fourth data and the plurality of pieces of fifth data to the first machine learning model.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: To properly determine the size of test data for machine learning.SOLUTION: A plurality of first models are learned by machine learning by use of training data 14a, 14b, 14c extracted from a data set 13. By inputting each of two or more records included in test data 15 extracted from the data set 13 to the first models, error information 16 indicating predictive error calculated for each combination of the first models and the records is generated. On the basis of the error information 16, a correspondence relationship 17 between the size of the test data and a distribution of measurement values of accuracy calculated by use of the test data is determined. In measuring the accuracy of second models learned by use of the training data 18 extracted from the data set 13 with the use of test data 19 extracted from the data set 13, the size of the test data 19 is determined so that the distribution satisfies a predetermined condition, on the basis of the correspondence relationship 17.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To enhance efficiency of a picking work.SOLUTION: A machine learning device stores learning data in which a gripping point position indicating the position of a gripping point of an article gripped by a robot arm in each article of an article group is associated with trajectory plan easiness to be a value obtained by quantifying the easiness of a trajectory plan for planning a trajectory up to the gripping point of the robot arm, as for a recognition image in which the article group and a box are recognized from an opening of the box storing the article group. The machine learning device acquires a first image about the article group and the box from the opening of the box, calculates a prediction position of the gripping point position and a prediction value of the trajectory plan easiness on the basis of image feature amount of the acquired first image using a parameter, and updates the parameter on the basis of the gripping point position and the trajectory plan easiness to be the learning data stored in a storage device and a calculation result calculated by calculation processing.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: Provided is a machine learning device (200) that continuously learns a small number of new classes compared to the base classes. A base class feature extraction unit (50) extracts a feature vector of the base classes. A new class feature extraction unit (52) extracts a feature vector of the new classes. A mixed feature calculation unit (60) mixes the feature vector of the base classes with the feature vector of the new classes to calculate a mixed feature vector of the base classes and the new classes. A learning unit (80) classifies a query sample in a query set on the basis of the distance between the position of the mixed feature vector of the query sample of the query set and the position of a classification weight vector for each class in a projection space, and learns a classification weight vector of the new classes so as to minimize classification loss.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: A pre-trained feature extraction unit (54) extracts feature vectors of samples in a base class using a pre-trained model. A base class classification weight (58) is for classifying the samples in the base class using the classification weight of the base class while using the feature vectors of the samples in the base class as input. A feature optimization unit (64) performs meta-learning of an optimization module that is based on the pre-trained model and optimizes feature vectors of samples in a novel class. A novel class feature averaging unit (66) averages the feature vectors of the samples in the novel class for each class and calculates the classification weight of the novel class. A graph neural network (70) uses the classification weights of the base class and novel class as input, performs meta-learning of the dependence relationship between the base and novel classes, and outputs a reconstruction classification weight.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning technique capable of alleviating saturation of filters.SOLUTION: A weight storage unit 50 stores weights of a plurality of filters used for feature detection of a task. A continuous learning unit 20 continuously learns the weights of the plurality of filters to an input task. A filter processing unit 30 locks the weights so as not to use a predetermined ratio of the filters, among the plurality of filters after learning of one task, in learning of another task, and initializes the weights in order to use the other filters in learning of the another task. A comparison unit 40 compares the weights of the plurality of filters after learning of two or more tasks, extracts the filters, which overlap and have the weights whose similarities are a threshold level or more, as shared filters between the tasks, keeps one filter of the overlapping filters as the shared filter, and initializes the weights of the filters other than the shared filter.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: Training data is discretized in a way to improve the model accuracy.With respect to a plurality of training data records in which combinations of data item values of a plurality of data items are individually associated with label information, the data item values are converted based on a criterion per data item into discretized data values. Training processing for training a model that receives the discretized data values as input and performs determination about the label information is performed by using a plurality of training data records obtained by the conversion. From an execution result of the training processing, a plurality of feature data records, each of which differently indicates a combination of two or more data items for the determination among the plurality of data items and a plurality of index values, which indicates importance level of the plurality of feature data records respectively are acquired. At least one of the feature data records is selected based on the index values, and the criterion for the discretization of the data item values is changed based on the at least one of the feature data records selected.

column13: To provide a machine learning technique configured to facilitate conversion of loss and reduce learning time.SOLUTION: A machine learning apparatus 200 continuously learns new classes smaller in number than basic classes. A basic class feature extraction unit 50 extracts feature vectors of the basic classes. A new class feature extraction unit 52 extracts feature vectors of the new classes. A mixed feature calculation unit 60 mixes the feature vectors of the basic classes and the feature vectors of the new classes to calculate mixed feature vectors of the basic classes and the new classes. A learning unit 80 classifies query samples of a query set on the basis of distances between positions of the mixed feature vectors of the query samples of the query set on a projection space and positions of classification weight vectors of the classes, to learn classification weight vectors of the new classes so as to minimize the loss of the classification.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 6

column13: A machine learning apparatus that continually learns a novel class with fewer samples than a base class is provided. A feature extraction unit (10) extracts a feature of input data by using a weight trained based on a divided feature of the input data. A base class classification unit (20) classifies into a base class based on the feature of the input data. A novel class classification unit (40) classifies into a novel class based on the feature of the input data. column13: The present invention addresses the problem that Attentions (regions of attention/interest) observed in an image by a plurality of Multi-Head Attention (MHA) heads in a ViT architecture may overlap and a head is likely to be wasted. A machine learning program according to the present invention causes a computer to execute a process for training a machine learning model having a plurality of mechanisms, each of which generates information of interest, such that the machine learning model calculates a cosine similarity of the information of interest generated by each of the plurality of mechanisms, calculates entropy of an aggregate value of the information of interest generated by the plurality of mechanisms, and minimizes the cosine similarity and maximizes the entropy. This makes it possible to suppress overlapping of the regions of interest of the plurality of MHA heads.

column13: To provide a machine learning technique for improving classification accuracy by using a graph model on which pseudo-continual learning has been effectively performed.SOLUTION: A machine learning device that continuously learns a smaller number of pieces of new-class data than the number of basic-class data, the machine learning device comprising: a feature extraction unit 51 that is trained in advance using first data of a basic class and second data of the basic class generated on the basis of one or more pieces of first data, receives input of data 20 of the new class, and outputs a feature vector of the new-class data 20; a weight calculation unit 52 that calculates classification weight for the new class on the basis of the feature vector; and a graph model 53 that receives input of the calculated classification weight and the classification weight of all classes previously learned and outputs reconstructed classification weight 54, and is subjected to pseudo-continuous learning using third data of the basic class generated on the basis of a plurality of pieces of data of the basic class, the first data, the second data, and the third data being different data respectively.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 4

column13: To provide a machine learning technique for improving class classification accuracy.SOLUTION: A pre-trained feature extraction unit 54 extracts, by using a pre-trained model, feature vectors of samples in a base class. A base class classification weight 58 is for receiving an input of feature vectors of the samples in the base class, to classify the samples in the base class by using the classification weight of the base class. A feature optimization unit 64 performs meta-learning of an optimization module by using the pre-trained model as a basis, and optimizes the feature vectors of samples in new classes. A new class feature averaging unit 66 averages, for each of the new classes, the feature vectors of the samples in the new class, and calculates the classification weight of the new class. column13: To minimize an average error of a trajectory g of a control target point including speed control with respect to a target trajectory f.SOLUTION: An acquisition section 18A of a machine learning device 10 acquires observation information including information on the speed of a control target point at a control target time. A first calculation section 18C calculates a reward for the observation information. A second calculation section 18D calculates a corrected discount rate obtained by correcting a discount rate of the reward in accordance with a travel distance of the control target point represented by the observation information. A learning section 18F learns a control measure by reinforcement learning from the observation information, the reward, and the corrected discount rate. column13: The present invention discretizes training data so that model accuracy is improved. With regard to a plurality of learning data in which label information is associated with a combination of data item values of a plurality of data items, a data item value is converted for each data item into a discretized data value that has been discretized on the basis of a prescribed criterion. A learning process for learning a model that accepts the discretized data value as input and performs an assessment pertaining to the label information is executed using the post-conversion plurality of learning data. A plurality of different feature information pieces indicating a combination of two or more data items used for assessment among the plurality of data items, and an index value indicating the importance of each of the plurality of feature information pieces, are acquired from the result of execution of the learning process. One or more feature information pieces are selected on the basis of the index value, and the criterion used for the discretization of data item values is altered on the basis of the selected one or more feature information pieces.

column13: In the present invention, a full-size learning image is reduced by an image reduction unit (11), the reduced image is input to a fully convolutional neural network (FCN) computation unit (13), and the FCN computation unit (13) performs computation under set filter coefficients to output a reduced label image. The reduced label image is enlarged to full size by an image enlargement unit (14), an error calculation unit (15) calculates an error between the enlarged label image and a full-size correct image on the basis of a loss function, and a parameter updating unit (16) updates the filter coefficients in accordance with the error. It is possible to create a learning model in which optimal segmentation is executed, while including errors that occur when images are enlarged, by repeating learning under the control of a learning control unit (17). Furthermore, by including image enlargement processing in the learning model, it is possible to output a full-size label image and to evaluate the accuracy of the model with high accuracy.

column13: To generate a predictive model with improved accuracy of harvest prediction of crops.SOLUTION: Training data including a plurality of records in which information on growing environment of sample agricultural products and required days from a reference date to a harvest date are associated with each other, and total number data showing an achievement distribution of the number of harvest relative to a harvest date for a crop set including a sample crop and other crops are acquired. A prediction model for calculating a probability distribution of a required number of days from information on growth environment is generated, and learning processing is started for repeating updating of the prediction model by evaluating an error of a probability distribution using the training data. In the middle of the learning processing, a plurality of probability distributions calculated by the predictive model from information on training environment indicated by a plurality of records are combined to calculate a predicted distribution of a harvest number relative to the harvest date, and a stop timing of the learning processing is determined based on a similarity degree between the predicted distribution and the achievement distribution.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 9

column12: Machine learning device, machine learning method, and machine learning program
column13: A weight storage unit (50) stores weights of a plurality of filters for feature detection of a job. A continuous learning unit (20) continuously learns weights of a plurality of filters for an input job. A filter control unit (40) compares the weight of a filter for a learned task with the weight of a filter for a currently learned task after a predetermined number of continuous learning rounds, and extracts, as a shared filter between tasks, a repeated filter for which the weight similarity is equal to or greater than a predetermined threshold value. One of the repeated filters is retained as a shared filter, and weights of filters other than the shared filter are initialized.

column13: To provide a machine learning technology capable of reducing a calculation amount to shorten a learning time while maintaining deduction performance.SOLUTION: Provided is a machine learning device that continuously learns a smaller number of new classes compared to base classes. A feature extraction unit 10 extracts features of input data. A base class classification unit 20 classifies the base classes based on the features of the input data. A new class classification unit 40 classifies the new classes based on the features of the input data. An attention attractor unit 30 normalizes weights in base classification and weights in new class classification. The attention attractor unit normalizes the weights in the base class classification and weights in the new class classification to be comparable with each other on a common feature space, calculates similarity degrees between the weights in the base class classification and the weights in the new class classification, to determine, to be objects of the normalization, a predetermined number of weights with high similarity degrees in the base class classification.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE
column13: To improve the accuracy of classification by a neural network.SOLUTION: A machine learning device 10 generates a combination pattern of variable values of each of items in a first item group and verification patterns 11a, 11b indicating, by an array of a plurality of reference values that correspond to a combination pattern of each of the variable values of each of items in a second item group, the sequencing of a plurality of numeric values when inputting the plurality of numeric values to a neural network 1. Next, the machine learning device 10 calculates a plurality of numeric values for input that correspond to each of the combination patterns of variable values of each of items in the first item group and each of the combination patterns of variable values of each of items in the second item group. Then, the machine learning device 10 determines the input order of the plurality of numeric values for input on the basis of the verification patterns 11a, 11b, calculates the output value of the neural network 1, calculates an error 8 of the numeric values for input, and updates the verification patterns 11a, 11b on the basis of the error 8 of the numeric values for input.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: Quality judgment on a laser beam intensity distribution is performed by taking an observation condition of the laser beam into consideration. A machine learning device includes: a state observing means that acquires data indicating an intensity distribution of a laser beam and data indicating a condition for observing the laser beam, performed to generate the data indicating the intensity distribution as input data; a label acquisition means that acquires an evaluation value related to judgment of the quality of the laser beam as a label; and a learning means that performs supervised learning using a pair of the input data acquired by the state observing means and the label acquired by the label acquisition means as training data to construct a learning model for judging the quality of the laser beam.

column13: The present invention improves the accuracy of machine learning using a document containing a plurality of words. From among words contained in a document (15), shared words used in both domains (13, 14) are identified. The weights (16) between the domains (13, 14) are calculated on the basis of two or more words other than the shared words among the words contained in the document (15). Feature information (15b) to be assigned to the shared words is calculated by using feature information (13b) calculated by using a model (13a) corresponding to the domain (13), feature information (14b) calculated by using a model (14a) corresponding to the domain (14), and the weights (16). A model (17) is trained by using the feature information (15b) and teacher labels (15a) assigned to the shared words contained in the document (15).

column13: The first learning unit (22) generates a first learning model by training the n pieces of learning data as objects using the object learning data. A model integration unit (23) integrates m first learning models selected from among the n first learning models to generate an integrated model. A data generation unit (24) generates new learning data by replacing a tag added to the target data with a soft tag that is a result of providing the target data as an input to the integrated model. The object data is learning data other than learning data used in training when generating m first learning models which are the basis of the integrated model. A second learning unit (25) performs training using the new learning data and generates a second learning model.

column13: To provide a machine learning technique with which modules for meta-learning can be reduced and learning is easily converged.SOLUTION: Provided is a machine learning device 200 that continuously learns a small number of new classes compared to the base classes. A base class feature extraction unit 50 extracts a feature vector of the base classes. A new class feature extraction unit 52 extracts a feature vector of the new classes. A mixed feature calculation unit 60 mixes the feature vector of the base classes with the feature vector of the new classes to calculate a mixed feature vector of the base classes and the new classes. A learning unit 80 classifies a query sample in a query set on the basis of a distance between the position of the mixed feature vector of the query sample of the query set and the position of a classification weight vector for each class in a projection space, and learns a classification weight vector of the new classes so as to minimize classification loss.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 6

column13: A machine learning program causes a computer to perform a process that includes identifying a first axis including elements represented by one-hot vectors and a second axis including elements not represented by one-hot vectors, among a plurality of axes included in tensor-form data, when calculating a core tensor from the tensor-form data via a plurality of intermediate tensors, calculating the core tensor from the tensor-form data by a first process of concatenating elements included in a first element matrix corresponding to the first axis to elements included in a first intermediate tensor among the plurality of intermediate tensors and a second process of calculating a mode product between a second intermediate tensor among the plurality of intermediate tensors and a second element matrix corresponding to the second axis, and performing machine learning of a machine learning model with the core tensor as an input.

column13: An inference unit (113) performs, for each model parameter set, inference on input data using a machine learning model to which the model parameter set is set, and obtains output data indicating the result of inference by the machine learning model to which the model parameter set is set. A comparison unit (114) compares features of the inference results between sets of output data to obtain a comparison result. An output unit (115) determines, on the basis of the comparison result, information leakage-related information in the information included in the inference result indicated by one of the sets of output data, applies a change for the information leakage-related information to the output data, and outputs the changed output data.

column12: Machine learning device, machine learning method, and machine learning program
column13: A pre-trained feature extraction unit (54) extracts feature vectors of samples of a basic class using a pre-trained model. A base class classification weight (58) uses the feature vectors of the samples of the base class as inputs, and classifies the samples of the base class using the classification weight of the base class. A feature optimization unit (64) performs meta-learning on an optimization module based on a pre-trained model, and optimizes a feature vector of a new-class sample. A new class feature averaging unit (66) averages the feature vectors of the new class samples for each class, and calculates the classification weights of the new classes. The graph neural network (70) uses the classification weight of the basic class and the classification weight of the new class as input, performs meta-learning on the dependency relationship between the basic class and the new class, and outputs the reconstructed classification weight.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning technology capable of learning a new class that has no semantic information.SOLUTION: A feature extraction unit 220 extracts feature vectors from input data. A semantic prediction unit 250 is a pre-meta-trained module that generates semantic vectors from the feature vectors of the input data. A mapping unit 230 is a module that generates semantic vectors from the feature vectors of the input data and has learned base classes. When semantic information is not assigned to the input data of a new class when learning the new class, an optimization unit 240 uses the semantic vector generated by the semantic prediction unit as a ground truth semantic vector, and optimizes parameters of the mapping unit so that a distance between the semantic vector generated by the mapping unit and the ground truth semantic vector is minimized.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2C

column13: To provide a machine learning program, a machine learning method and a machine learning system capable of accurately extracting abnormal data to be extracted even when the number of abnormal data usable as teacher data is small.SOLUTION: A first model is generated by performing deep unsupervised learning of a plurality of sensor data outputted from a plurality of sensors; a feature quantity corresponding to each sensor data is extracted from a comparison result between each sensor data and restored sensor data output from the first model with the input of each sensor data, for each of the plurality of sensor data; and a second model is generated by performing supervised learning of data in which each feature quantity and state information indicating whether sensor data corresponding to each feature quantity corresponds to an abnormal state are associated with each other for each extracted feature quantity.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 12

column12: MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE
column13: To improve the accuracy of classification by a neural network.SOLUTION: A machine learning device 10 calculates a second parameter value for each set of a combination pattern and a neuron in the next layer on the basis of a first parameter value that is set for each set of the variable value of each of a plurality of items and a neuron in the next layer to the input layer of a neural network 1. The second parameter value is the product of first parameter values of a set of each of variable values included in the combination pattern and the neuron in the next layer. Next, the machine learning device 10 calculates the output value of the neural network 1 that corresponds to the input of a plurality of numeric values conforming to the input order, using the calculated second parameter value as a weight value to the numeric value inputted to the neuron in the next layer. Furthermore, the machine learning device 10 updates the plurality of reference values of a verification pattern 11a and the first parameter value on the basis of an error between the output value and teacher data 3.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: A feature extraction unit (220) extracts a feature vector from input data. A semantic prediction unit (250) is a module has been trained in advance in a meta-learning process and that generates a semantic vector from the feature vector of the input data. A mapping unit (230) is a module that has learned a base class and that generates a semantic vector from the feature vector of the input data. An optimization unit (240) optimizes parameters of the mapping unit using the semantic vector generated by the semantic prediction unit as a correct answer semantic vector such that a distance between the semantic vector generated by the mapping unit and the correct answer semantic vector is minimized when semantic information is not added to input data of a novel class at the time of learning the novel class.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM, AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning device: updates a distribution parameter based on the actual environment attribute feature corresponding to biometric information on a target user; extracts an attribute feature from the updated distribution parameter; generate combined biometric information based on the extracted attribute feature and a training identification feature extracted from training biometric information; and updates a machine learning model based on the combined biometric information and the training biometric information, the attribute feature is a feature that has an influence on an authentication accuracy of biometric authentication and has a low correlation with an identification feature, and the identification feature is used for collation in the biometric authentication.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS
column13: To generate a prediction model in which an accuracy of a harvest prediction of field crops is improved.SOLUTION: Training data including a plurality of records in which information of cultivation environment of a specimen field crop and a time required until harvest date is obtained are associated with each other. A prediction model that calculates a probability distribution of the required time from the information of the cultivation environment is generated, and learning processing that repeats updating of the prediction model using the training data is performed. In each update of the prediction model repeated in the learning processing, fluctuations of means and variance of the probability distribution calculated by the prediction model before and after update to each of the plurality of records are controlled to be within a predetermined range.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 12

column12: MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE
column13: To provide a machine learning program, a machine learning method, and a machine learning device, for improving inference accuracy of a machine learning model.SOLUTION: A machine learning program causes a computer to execute, based on multiple feature quantities of multiple data obtained by inputting the multiple data into a machine learning model, processing of clustering the multiple data under conditions that allow classification to multiple groups that are used as correct labels for training data and other groups that are not used as correct labels, generating training data with correct labels assigned to multiple data based on clustering results, and training the machine learning model based on the generated training data.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning technique capable of performing transition learning according to characteristics of a domain.SOLUTION: When a first model of neural network learned using teacher data of a first domain is subjected to transition learning by teacher data of a second domain, a domain adaptive data fullness degree determining part 52 determines a domain adaptive data fullness degree on the basis of the number of teacher data of a second domain. A learning layer determining part 54 determines a layer of a learning object of a second model obtained by copying the first model, based on the domain adaptive data fullness degree. A transition learning execution part 56 subjects the layer of the learning object of the second model to transition learning using the teacher data of the second domain.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

column12: MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning technique configured to facilitate conversion of loss and improve classification accuracy.SOLUTION: A machine learning apparatus 200 continuously learns new classes smaller in number than basic classes. A basic class feature extraction unit 50 extracts feature vectors of the basic classes. A new class feature extraction unit 52 extracts feature vectors of the new classes. A mixed feature calculation unit 60 mixes the feature vectors of the basic classes and the feature vectors of the new classes to calculate mixed feature vectors of the basic classes and the new classes. A neighboring class selection unit 94 selects, as neighboring classes, a predetermined number of classes located within a predetermined distance from positions of mixed feature vectors of query samples on a projection space. A learning unit 80 learns classification weight vectors of the new classes so as to minimize the loss of classification calculated based on distances between the positions of the mixed feature vectors of the query samples on the projection space and positions of classification weight vectors of the predetermined number of selected neighboring classes.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 10

column13: A weight storage unit (50) stores weights of a plurality of filters used to detect a feature of a task. A continual learning unit (20) trains the weights of the plurality of filters in response to an input task in continual learning. A filter control unit (40) compares, after a predetermined epoch number has been learned in continual learning, the weight of a filter that has learned the task with the weight of a filter that is learning the task, extracts overlap filters having a similarity in weight equal to or greater than a predetermined threshold value as shared filters shared by tasks, and leaves one of the overlap filters as the shared filter and initializes the weights of filters other than the shared filter.

column13: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To enable a proper order of input values to be determined.SOLUTION: A machine learning apparatus 10 determines input order of a plurality of values included in input data 2 based on a check pattern 3 indicating, in the form of a sequence of a plurality of reference values, reference for sequencing values which are input to a neural network 1 for data classification. Next, the machine learning apparatus 10 calculates an output value of the neural network 1 when a plurality of values are input to a plurality of units in an input layer of the neural network 1 in accordance with input order. Further, the machine learning apparatus 10 calculates, based on an error between an output value and a teacher data, an error of input value input to the plurality of units in the input layer required for obtaining a correct answer by the neural network 1. The machine learning apparatus 10 updates, based on an error of input values for a plurality of units, a plurality of reference values of the check pattern 3.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: Provided is a machine learning device (200) that continuously learns a small number of new classes compared to the base classes. A mixed feature calculation unit (60) mixes the feature vector of the base classes with the feature vector of the new classes to calculate a mixed feature vector of the base classes and the new classes. column13: To provide a machine learning program, a machine learning device, and a machine learning system for improving learning efficiency of machine learning.SOLUTION: A machine learning program causes a computer to execute processing of acquiring a behavior of an expert between a predetermined number of episodes in a predetermined environment to which a sparse reward function is given, collecting, for every episode, information on types of events occurring on the basis of the behavior in the predetermined environment and an amount of the event for every type, and on a profit that is finally gained by the expert on the basis of the sparse reward function, calculating a correlation coefficient between the amount of the event and the profit for every type, and executing normalization and clipping for the correlation coefficient to generate a dense reward function to define a reward at occurrence of the event for every type.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: To provide a machine learning device, machine learning method, and machine learning program capable of creating a learned model having a sufficient performance from a data set containing private data while protecting privacy.SOLUTION: A machine learning device 1 includes: a data dividing unit 11 for dividing training data of a machine learning model into a first set containing private data and a second set not containing the private data; a first learning unit 12 for allowing the machine learning model to learn by using the first set; a model dividing unit 13 for dividing the machine learning model learned by the first learning unit 12 into an input side model and an output side model; a model substitution unit 14 for substituting the output side model with an initial model having a form suitable to a task of the second set; and a second learning unit 15 for allowing a part of the machine learning model containing at least the initial model to learn by using the second set.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: To suppress an adverse effect due to a generation process of a pseudo attractor on machine learning.SOLUTION: A learning device generates a sine wave from a basic cycle of input data having periodic nature. The learning device identifies a sampling period based on roundness of an attractor generated from the sine wave. The learning device samples the input data at the identified sampling period to generate a pseudo attractor. The learning device performs machine learning using the pseudo attractor.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: A previously learned feature extraction unit (54) extracts, by using a previously learned model, feature vectors of samples in a base class. A base class classification weight (58) is for, when there is an input of feature vectors of the samples in the base class, classifying the samples in the base class by using the classification weight of the base class. A feature optimization unit (64) performs meta-learning of an optimization module by using the previously learned model as a basis, and optimizes the feature vectors of samples in new classes. A new class feature averaging unit (66) averages, for each of the new classes, the feature vectors of the samples in the new class, and calculates the classification weight of the new class. A graph neural network (70) receives input of the classification weight of the base class and classification weights of the new classes, performs meta-learning of dependence relationships between the base class and the new classes, and outputs reconstruction classification weights.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: A new class image generation unit (61) processes an image of a base class and generates an image of a new class. An image feature quantity output unit (62) has been pre-trained by the image of the base class and uses the image of the base class or the image of the new class as input to output an image feature quantity. A language classification weight output unit (65) has been pre-trained by the image of the base class and a sentence describing the image of the base class, and uses the sentence describing the image of the base class as input to output a language classification weight. An image classification weight output unit (64) uses the image feature quantity as input to calculate the average value of the image feature quantity for each class and outputs the average value as an image classification weight for each class. An optimization unit (66) uses the image classification weight and the language classification weight as input to optimize the image classification weight and outputs a reconstruction classification weight.

column12: Machine learning method, machine learning device, and machine learning program
column13: A full-size training image is reduced by an image reduction unit (11) and input to an FCN (Fully Convolutional Neural Network) computation unit (13), and the FCN computation unit (13) performs calculation under a set filter coefficient and outputs a reduced label image. The reduced label image is enlarged to a full size by an image enlargement unit (14), the error calculation unit (15) calculates an error between the enlarged label image and a full-size ground truth based on a loss function, and the parameter update unit (16) updates a filter coefficient depending on the error. By repeating learning under the control of the learning control unit 17, it is possible to generate a learning model for performing optimal segmentation including an error generated at the time of image enlargement. Further, by including the image enlargement processing in the learning model, a full-size label image can be output, and the accuracy evaluation of the model can also be performed with high accuracy.

column12: Machine learning device, machine learning method, and machine learning program
column13: A feature extraction unit (220) extracts a feature vector from input data. The semantic prediction unit (250) is a module that generates a semantic vector on the basis of a feature vector of input data and has been meta-learned in advance. The mapping unit (230) is a module for generating a learned basic category of a semantic vector on the basis of a feature vector of input data. When semantic information is not given to the input data of the new class during learning of the new class, an optimization unit (240) optimizes the parameter of the mapping unit so that the distance between the semantic vector generated by the mapping unit and the forward semantic vector is minimized, using the semantic vector generated by the semantic prediction unit as the forward semantic vector.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: A weight storage unit (50) stores weights of a plurality of filters that are used in feature detection of a task. A continual learning unit (20) continually learns the weights of the plurality of filters for an inputted task. A filter processing unit (30) locks the weights of a prescribed proportion of filters among the plurality of filters after the learning of one task, such that said filters with locked weights will not be used in the learning of a different task, and resets the weights of the other filters in order for said other filters to be used in the learning of a different task. A comparison unit (40) compares the weights of the plurality of filters after the learning of two or more tasks, and extracts overlapping filters, in which the degree of similarity between the weights thereof is greater than or equal to a prescribed threshold value, as a shared filter among the tasks, retaining one filter among the overlapping filters as the shared filter and resetting the weight or weights of the filter or filters other than said shared filter.

column13: To make it easier to grasp how minute data is linked in machine learning.SOLUTION: A machine learning program of an embodiment causes a computer to execute processing for identifying axes of label mode and axes of topology mode in tensor-form data and selecting one axis from among the axes of topology mode. The machine learning program also causes the computer to execute processing for calculating a core tensor from the tensor-form data by first processing, second processing, and third processing. The first processing links elements included in an element matrix corresponding to an axis of label mode to elements included in an intermediate tensor. The second processing calculates a mode product between the intermediate tensor and an element matrix corresponding to axes of topology mode other than one axis. The third processing shares and links elements included in an element matrix corresponding to one axis and elements included in an element matrix corresponding to axes of topology mode other than the one axis with elements in the intermediate tensor.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 8

column13: This machine learning device is capable of preventing decreased estimation precision for a learning model even when there is a large difference among a plurality of pieces of numerical value data used as teaching data. This machine learning device comprises: a normalization unit which acquires a plurality of pieces of numerical value data indicating a plurality of numerical values which conform to a prescribed arrangement, computes for each piece of numerical value data a numerical value range of plurality of numerical values indicated by each piece of numerical value data, and normalizes the plurality of numerical values included in each piece of numerical value data on the basis of the numerical value range defined by the largest numerical value and the smallest numerical value from among the numerical value ranges corresponding to the numerical value data in whole or in part; and a learning unit which generates or updates a learning model by machine learning using numerical value data indicating the normalized plurality of numerical values as teaching data.

column13: A machine learning device (200) according to the present invention comprises: an NN (32s) including an NN lower layer unit (110s) and an NN upper layer unit (120s) including a base-class classification output unit (121) that inputs an output value of the NN lower layer unit (110s) based on data (15) on a base class and data (20) on a new class and outputs a base-class classification and a new-class classification output unit (122) that inputs an output value of the NN lower layer unit (110) based on the data (20) on the new class and outputs a new-class classification; a loss calculation unit (130s) that calculates losses of the base- and new-class classifications; and an update unit (140s) that updates weights (θo), (θn) on the basis of the sum of the loss of the base-class classification and the loss of the new-class classification while keeping a weight (θs) fixed.

column13: A domain adaptation data richness determination unit (52) determines, when a first model trained by using training data of a first domain is trained by transfer learning by using training data of a second domain, a domain adaptation data richness based on the number of items of training data of the second domain, the first model being a neural network. A learning layer determining unit (54) determines a layer in the second model, which is a duplicate of the first model, targeted for training, based on the domain adaptation data richness. A transfer learning unit (56) applies transfer learning to the layer in the second model targeted for training, by using the training data of the second domain.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE, AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: In the present invention, a full-size learning image is reduced by an image reduction unit (11), the reduced image is input to a fully convolutional neural network (FCN) computation unit (13), and theFCN computation unit (13) performs computation under set filter coefficients to output a reduced label image. The reduced label image is enlarged to full size by an image enlargement unit (14), an error calculation unit (15) calculates an error between the enlarged label image and a full-size correct image on the basis of a loss function, and a parameter updating unit (16) updates the filter coefficients in accordance with the error. It is possible to create a learning model in which optimal segmentation is executed, while including errors that occur when images are enlarged, by repeating learning under the control of a learning control unit (17). Furthermore, by including image enlargement processing in the learning model, it is possible to output a full-size label image and to evaluatethe accuracy of the model with high accuracy.

column13: This machine learning device is configured to comprise: an image set acquisition unit (1) that acquires an image set including one or more images; and an image set selection unit (6) that selects an image set similar to the image set acquired by the image set acquisition unit (1) from among a plurality of image sets different from the image set acquired by the image set acquisition unit (1). In addition, the machine learning device is provided with: a performance comparison unit (10) that acquires, as the performances of a plurality of machine-trained learning models, the performances of learning models in which machine training has been performed using respective image sets obtained by performing a plurality of different preprocessings on the image set which has been selected by the image set selection unit (6), and compares, with each other, the performances of the plurality of machine-trained learning models; and a preprocessing acquisition unit (11) that, on the basis of the performance comparison results from the performance comparison unit (10), selects one of the plurality of machine-trained learning models, and acquires the preprocessing that has been performed on the image set used in machine training for the selected learning model. In addition, the machine learning device is provided with a model training unit (12) that performs the preprocessing acquired by the preprocessing acquisition unit (11) on an image set acquired by the image set acquisition unit (1), and uses the preprocessed image set to perform machine training on an untrained learning model.

column13: A computer is caused to execute processes for: using a magnitude estimation unit (12), which is a magnitude estimation AI, to estimate a first magnitude estimation value which indicates the magnitude of data change in the changed data; using a magnitude adjustment learning apparatus (14) to first update a learning apparatus (10) so as to add data change corresponding to the magnitude indicated by the first magnitude estimation value to data before the change; using the first updated learning apparatus (10) to add the data change to the data before the change to generate the changed data; using the magnitude estimation unit (12), which is the magnitude estimation AI, to estimate a second magnitude estimation value which indicates the magnitude of data change in the changed data; and comparing the first magnitude estimation value and the second magnitude estimation value to cause the magnitude adjustment learning apparatus (14) to perform first learning so that the second magnitude estimation value approaches the first magnitude estimation value.
