column13: The present disclosure is a machining learning device that continuously learns data of a new class that is smaller than data of a basic class. The machine learning device comprises: a characteristics extraction unit (51) that is trained in advance with a basic class data, receives data of a new class (20) as an input, and outputs a characteristic vector of the new class data (20); a weight calculation unit (52) that calculates a class weight of the new data class on the basis of the characteristic vector; and a graph model (53) that receives the calculated class weight of the new class and the class weight of all previously learned classes as inputs, outputs a reconstruction class weight (54) by adapting the input class weight for reconstruction, performs pseudo-continual-learning of other data of the basic class generated on the basis of multiple pieces of data of the basic class, and meta-learns the dependency relationship between the basic class and the new class.

column13: The invention relates to a machine learning program, a machine learning method, and a machine learning apparatus. Training data discretization is carried out, so that the model precision is improved. For each of a plurality of pieces of learning data in which tag information is associated with a combination of data item values of a plurality of data items, the data item value is converted into a discretized data value discretized on the basis of a prescribed reference. A learning process for learning a model for performing a determination on tag information using the discretized data value as an input is performed using the plurality of converted learning data. A plurality of different pieces of feature information indicating a combination of two or more data items for determination among the plurality of data items, and an index value indicating the importance of each of the plurality of pieces of feature information, are acquired from the results of execution of the learning process. One or more pieces of feature information are selected on the basis of the index value, and a reference for discretization of the data item value is changed on the basis of the selected one or more pieces of feature information.

column13: The invention relates to a machine learning device, a machine learning system, and a machine learning method related to the laser learning process. The quality judgment on a laser beam intensity distribution is performed by taking an observation condition of the laser beam into consideration. A machine learning device (10) includes: a state observing means (11) that acquires data indicating an intensity distribution of a laser beam and data indicating a condition for observing the laser beam, performed to generate the data indicating the intensity distribution as input data; a label acquisition means (12) that acquires an evaluation value related to judgment of the quality of the laser beam as a label; and a learning means (13) that performs supervised learning using a pair of the input data acquired by the state observing means (11) and the label acquired by the label acquisition means (12) as training data to construct a learning model for judging the quality of the laser beam.

column13:
PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To dynamically change a threshold for the discretization of a continuous value so that the distribution of the output probability of a binary identity becomes a distribution suitable for machine learning in a machine learning method which gives a continuous value as an input value.

SOLUTION: An obtaining part 201 obtains threshold candidates and a continuous value. A temporary discretization part 202 extracts a binary identity from the continuous value by discretizing the continuous value by using the threshold candidates for each threshold candidate obtained. A temporary calculation part 203 calculates the output probability of the binary identity for each binary identity extracted. An extracting part 204 extracts a combination of two consecutive threshold candidates from among the threshold candidates obtained. A numerical difference calculation part 205 calculates the numerical difference of the output probability calculated for each combination extracted. A decision part 206 decides the threshold from among the threshold candidates obtained based on the numerical difference calculated.

column13: [과제] 실제 환경의 유저의 생체 정보를 수집하지 않고, 실제 환경을 반영한 생체 정보를 이용한 기계 학습을 실현한다. [해결수단] 기계 학습 장치는, 대상 유저의 생체 정보에 대응하는 실제 환경 속성 특징량에 기초하여, 속성 특징량의 분포를 갱신하고, 당해 갱신한 분포로부터 속성 특징량을 추출하고, 당해 추출한 속성 특징량과, 학습용 생체 정보로부터 추출되는 학습용 식별 특징량에 기초하여, 합성 생체 정보를 생성하고, 합성 생체 정보와, 학습용 생체 정보에 기초하여, 기계 학습 모델을 갱신하고, 당해 기계 학습 모델은, 생체 정보가 입력되면 생체의 특징을 나타내는 정보를 출력하고, 속성 특징량은, 생체 인증의 인증 정밀도에 영향을 미치고, 또한 식별 특징량과의 상관이 낮으며, 식별 특징량은, 생체 인증에 있어서의 대조에 사용된다.

column13: To provide a machine learning device, method, and program for performing learning for a new class not having semantic information.SOLUTION: In a machine learning device 200, a feature extraction unit 220 extracts feature vectors from input data. A semantic prediction unit 250 is a pre-meta-trained module that generates semantic vectors from feature vectors of the input data. A mapping unit 230 is a module that has learned base classes and generates semantic vectors from the feature vectors of the input data. When semantic information is not assigned to the input data of a new class during learning of the new class, an optimization unit 240 uses the semantic vector generated by the semantic prediction unit as a correct semantic vector, and optimizes parameters of the mapping unit so that a distance between the semantic vector generated by the mapping unit and the correct semantic vector is minimized.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2C

column13: To provide a machine learning technique capable of alleviating saturation of filters.SOLUTION: A weight storage unit 50 stores weights of a plurality of filters used for feature detection of a task. A continuous learning unit 20 continuously learns the weights of the plurality of filters to an input task. A filter control unit 40 compares the weight of the filter which finishes learning of the task with the weight of the filter which is during the learning of the task, after continuous learning of a predetermined number of epochs, extracts the filters, which overlap and have the weights whose similarities are a threshold level or more, as shared filters between the tasks, keeps one filter of the overlapping filters as the shared filter, and initializes the weights of the filters other than the shared filter.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

column13: To make a neural network learn a class corresponding to one or a small number of pieces of learning data, without depending on statistical features of the neural network, using one or a small number of pieces of the learning data while maintaining performance of the neural network.SOLUTION: A learning device includes steps of: calculating a specific active value vector xnew corresponding to a specific class of at least one piece of learning data Dnc from at least one active value vector output from at least one hidden layer Lh1 to LhM to output layer Lo, respectively, for at least one piece of the learning data Dnc; calculating a normalization vector by performing a quantile normalization F referring to a weight matrix Wori of the output layer Lo as reference distribution for the specified active value vector xnew; adding the normalization vector to the weighting matrix; and adding neuron No3 corresponding to the specific class to the output layer Lo.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 5

column12: Learning machine and learning system
column13: The utility model pertains to the technical field of education electronic products, and provides a learning machine and a learning system. The learning machine comprises a microcontroller unit. The learning machine further comprises a network interface and an input device. The microcontroller unit is connected with the network interface and the input device separately. The microcontroller unit is used to receive search request information inputted by a user through the input device and search information related to the search request information at the network side through the network interface. When the learning machine of the utility model is implemented in the case that the information related to the search request information does not exist in the storage device, the information related to the search request information can be searched at the network side through the network interface so as to satisfy the learning needs of the user.

column12: Learning machine and learning apparatus
column13: The utility model relates to a learning machine and a learning device, the learning machine comprises a body and an earphone cover, the body comprises a front side and a back side, the front side is provided with a display screen, and the back side is provided with an earphone groove; the earphone cover is rotatably arranged on the back surface and used for covering the earphone in the earphone groove, the earphone cover comprises a rotating end and a covering end, the rotating end is rotatably connected to the first side of the earphone groove, and the covering end is connected to the second side of the earphone groove; when the earphone cover is opened to the maximum degree, the covering end is separated from the second side, and the projection pattern of the rotating end on the front side is located between the projection pattern of the covering end on the front side and the projection pattern of the second side on the front side. According to the learning machine and the learning device, when the earphone cover is opened to the maximum degree, the covering end of the earphone cover can be supported on the supporting face, the earphone cover can serve as a support to adjust the watching angle of the body, the learning machine and the learning device conform to ergonomics, and a user can watch the display screen more comfortably.

column12: LEARNING METHOD FOR LEARNING MACHINE
column13: PURPOSE:To make it possible to moderate the learning condition of a learning machine by making the learning machine examine all of instructor's output data, and calculate all of evaluation values of instructor's output data that an evaluation value obtained before adjusting parameter is closest to the optimum value and determining the evaluation value. CONSTITUTION:The learning machine reads input data to be input to the first neuron element 11 of input layer 12 and a set Yk of instructor's output data consisting of elements (yk.m). Next, output data Ok is outputted from a neural network, an evaluation value calculating means 9 calculates a loss function rm based on a set of instructor's output data and output data Ok, and further, a value m is selected that minimizes the function rm. After that, a parameter adjusting means 7 uses an evaluation value corresponding to the selected m to adjust coupling coefficients WHIji and WOHkj. With this, the learning machine is made to learn the evaluation value so as to be close to the optimum value, and when a learning terminate condition is satisfied, the learning machine terminates learning, otherwise, the machine returns to the start position.

column12: Learning machine for learning news
column13: The utility model discloses a learning machine for learning news, and relates to the technical field of learning machines. The learning machine comprises a workbench, supporting legs are fixedly connected to the four corners of the bottom of the workbench, a rectangular groove is formed in the upper surface of the workbench, a mounting plate is rotationally connected to one end of the rectangular groove, a mounting groove is formed in the upper surface of the mounting plate, and a learning machine body is placed in the mounting groove. The rotating angle of the mounting plate can be adjusted by adjusting the clamping plate to be inserted into the clamping grooves at different positions, so that the angle of the learning machine body can be conveniently adjusted, and people with different heights can conveniently look down to see the learning machine body; the user can be prevented from holding the learning machine body for a long time to use the learning machine body, so that the arm of the user can be prevented from aching pain.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS, MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning apparatus, a machine learning system, a machine learning method, and a program which have high learning accuracy by acquiring parameter data from a plurality of devices to increase teacher data in number.SOLUTION: A machine learning apparatus according to the present invention has an acquiring unit for acquiring third data including first data including at least one of parameter data collected with respect to a plurality of collection devices and teacher data created from the parameter data and second data indicating conditions of collection of the parameter data associated with the first data, a selection unit for selecting specific data from the third data, and a learning unit for carrying out machine learning with the specific data to generate a leant model used for a target device. The selection unit selects the specific data associated with the collection conditions whose use conditions of the leant model for the target device as well as the collection conditions in the collection devices are closer as compared with predetermined references.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS, MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND PROGRAM
column13: A machine learning apparatus includes an acquisition unit that acquires third data including first data and second data, the first data including at least one of parameter data collected for a plurality of collection devices and teacher data created from the parameter data, and the second data which are associated with the first data and which represent collection conditions of the parameter data; a selection unit that selects specific data from the third data; and a learning unit that performs machine learning using the specific data, and generates a trained model which is to be used for a target device. Further, the selection unit selects the specific data which are associated with the collection conditions in which a difference between usage conditions of the trained model for the target device and the collection conditions in the collection devices is equal to or less than a predetermined reference.

column12: Machine learning system and machine learning method
column13: Machine learning system comprising a host device and a plurality of client devices. The host device is configured to store and update a host model. The client devices are configured to be communicatively coupled to the host device and receive the host model, and comprise a first and second client device, storing a first and a second parameter set respectively and configured to train the received host model according to the first and the second parameter sets, respectively, to respectively generate a first and a second training result. If the host device receives the first training result corresponding to an mth training round but does not receive the second training result corresponding to a nth training round, when a difference between m and n is not larger than a threshold value, and m is larger than n, the host device updates the host model according to the first training result without using the second training result. Also disclosed are another machine learning system and a machine learning method.

column12: Machine learning apparatus and machine learning system
column13: Provided are a machine learning device and a machine learning system that can perform learning at a high speed by reducing the weight of learning data. A machine learning apparatus includes: a machine learning unit that learns learning data including an image and a tag for the image; an image processing unit that performs image processing on the image using an image processing program; a lightweight learning data creation unit that intercepts, from the image, a partial image to be used in learning by the machine learning unit, and creates lightweight learning data including the partial image; and a learning data control unit that stores lightweight learning data in association with the image processing program, in which the machine learning unit learns the learning data or the lightweight learning data.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To enable machine learning with simple operations.SOLUTION: A machine learning system comprises a display device and a learning device. The learning device causes a variable selection section (83) in a learning execution screen (70a) of the display device to display a result of extracting explanatory variables candidates and objective variables candidates from a target file designated by a user. The learning device causes a result display section (85) in the learning execution screen (70a) to display a result of analyzing, by machine learning, a relation between an explanatory variable and an objective variable selected by the user from among the explanatory variables candidates and the objective variables candidates displayed in the variable selection section (83).SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM
column13: A machine learning method performs training of values of model parameters forming a machine learning model, and is performed in a machine learning system including a vehicle having the machine learning model and a server able to communicate with the vehicle. The machine learning method includes: detecting, by the server, a current processing load of the server; determining, by the server, processing amounts of training respectively performed by the server and the vehicle, based on the processing load; performing, by the server, training of the values of the model parameters in accordance with the determined processing amount in the server; and performing, by the vehicle, training of the values of the model parameters in accordance with the determined processing amount in the vehicle. The server decreases a processing amount at the server when the processing load is relatively high compared to when it is relatively low.

column12: Machine learning method and machine learning device
column13: The machine learning method includes: a data set division process of dividing a period into a learning period and a verification period, and dividing a data set into learning data and verification data; a candidate learning period division process for dividing the candidate learning period into a plurality of divided learning periods; a learning period evaluation process for generating a learning period evaluation model for each divided learning period using learning data corresponding to the divided learning periods, and calculating an evaluation index for the learning period evaluation model for each divided learning period using verification data; a learning period selection process in which the candidate learning period division process and the learning period evaluation process are repeated until a predetermined end condition is satisfied, and when the end condition is satisfied, a divided learning period having a high evaluation index is selected as a learning target period; and a model output process for outputting a learning model that has been machine-learned using the learning data corresponding to the learning target period.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: The present invention obtains good performance even with a small amount of training data, by reducing time and labor required for collection of training data for use in learning. This machine learning device is provided with: an acquisition unit that acquires inference data and training data for use in machine learning; a learning unit that performs machine learning on the basis of the training data and a plurality of sets of learning parameters and generates a plurality of trained models; a model assessment unit that makes assessment of whether or not the learning results by the plurality of trained models are good and displays the assessment results; a model selection unit that can receive selection of a trained model; an inference calculation unit that performs inference calculation processing on the basis of at least some of the plurality of trained models and the inference data and generates inference result candidates; and an inference determination unit that outputs all or some of the inference result candidates or combinations thereof.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning system includes a host device and several client devices. The client devices receive a host model from the host device, respectively, and include a first and a second client devices. The first and the second client devices store a first and a second parameter sets, respectively, and perform training on the received host models according to the first and the second parameter sets, respectively, to respectively generate a first and a second training results. If the host device has received the first training result corresponding to an m-th training round but has not received the second training result corresponding to a n-th round training, when a difference between m and n is not higher than a threshold value, the host device updates the host model according to the first training result without using the second training result.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: Provided are a machine learning device and a machine learning program that are capable of improving the accuracy of individual identification, emotion recognition, and physical condition estimation. A face feature amount calculation unit (31) calculates a face feature amount from a face image, and a face individual identification unit (42) compares the calculated face feature amount with a face feature amount for individual identification in a label DB (56). When a difference between the face feature amount calculated by the face feature amount calculation unit (31) and the face feature amount for individual identification in the label DB (56) is larger than a prescribed value, the face feature amount in the label DB (56) is updated by the face feature amount calculated by the face feature amount calculation unit (31). When the face feature amount calculation unit (31) calculates a face feature amount that remains similar for a prescribed time and the label DB (56) contains no record of emotion of an identified individual including a feature amount similar to said face feature amount, the record of said individual including emotion resulting from a query and said face feature amount is added to the label DB (56).

column13: To provide a technique that can obtain an accurate deep learning model through associative learning.SOLUTION: A machine learning system according to an aspect of the present disclosure trains a machine learning model through associative learning, and the machine learning system has: a first receiving unit that receives statistical information of pieces of data generated by routers included in a target network; a second receiving unit that receives the throughput and local learning time of servers included in the target network; and an optimization unit that, by using the statistical information, the throughput, and the local learning time, optimizes a parameter representing the ratio of the pieces of data from the routers flowing in links constituting the target network in a specific direction, and a transfer path of a model parameter for the machine learning model between a central server managing the model parameter and the server, so as to minimize the ratio of the amount of data held in the server, and the sum related to the server of the product of the inter-dataset distances between a dataset held by the server and a dataset obtained by virtually putting all pieces of data into one.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 7

column13: The purpose of the present invention is to provide a machine learning device, a machine learning method, a program, and a machine learning system with which it is possible to predict high performance catalysts. A machine learning device according to the present disclosure is designed to predict catalyst performance, said device comprising: an acquisition unit that acquires a data set of interest including intended catalytic reaction information and a plurality of data sets including catalytic reaction information that is different from the intended catalytic reaction; a determination unit that determines commonality regarding catalytic reactions between the data set of interest and each of the plurality of data sets; and a training unit that trains a prediction model that predicts catalyst performance, using a data set selected from the plurality of data sets on the basis of the determination result and the data set of interest.

column13: To provide a machine learning system capable of comprehending the influences on the performance of a machine learning model, which is rendered by exclusion or addition of evaluation target data to training data.SOLUTION: A machine learning system 100 includes: an acquisition unit that acquires an initial data group used for learning a learning model, an evaluation target data to be added or excluded from the initial data group, and a verification data group that includes at least one element that is not included in the evaluation target data; and a contribution calculation unit that calculates the contribution to the evaluation of the effect of the data to be evaluated on the performance of the learning model based on the output value by the training model that inputs the verification data group and the output value by the re-learning model that is trained by adding or excluding the evaluation target data to the initial data group.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: Machine learning method and machine learning device
column13: A machine learning method and a machine learning device are provided. The machine learning method includes: receiving an input signal and performing normalization on the input signal; transmitting the normalized input signal to a convolutional layer; and adding a sparse coding layer after the convolutional layer, wherein the sparse coding layer uses dictionary atoms to reconstruct signals on a projection of the normalized input signal passing through the convolutional layer, and the sparse coding layer receives a mini-batch input to refresh the dictionary atoms.

column12: Machine learning apparatus and machine learning method
column13: A machine learning device (1) learns the cause of an alarm of a motor drive device (2), and is provided with: a state observation unit (10) that observes the state of the motor drive device (2); the state variable acquisition unit acquires, as a state variable, a characteristic quantity including at least one of a current detection value detected from a motor acquired from a motor drive device (2), a speed command value specifying the rotational speed of the motor, an output voltage value output to the motor, a speed estimation value of the motor, and a speed detection value of the motor. Acquiring an alarm cause corresponding to the feature amount as tag data; and a learning unit (11) that generates a learning model for estimating a new alarm cause corresponding to the new feature amount on the basis of a data set created on the basis of a combination of the state variable and the tag data.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To provide a machine learning device capable of easily constructing a prediction model which can highly accurately predict organoleptic evaluation results from aroma measurement data, and a machine learning method.SOLUTION: A machine learning device 20 constructs a prediction model 11 which predicts aroma organoleptic evaluation results from measurement data acquired by separating ingredients contained in a sample by a GC-IMS device. The machine learning device 20 comprises: a learning unit 23 which performs machine learning of a prediction model 11 with measurement data in a learning sample and organoleptic evaluation results as teacher data and a preprocessing unit 22 which preprocesses measurement data. The preprocessing unit 22 includes an averaging processing unit 222 which performs averaging processing for averaging a data group constituting measurement data per first prescribed number along the lapse of an IMS drift time and also averaging the data group per second prescribed number along the lapse of GC retention time.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 4

column12: MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS AND MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM
column13: To suppress estimation accuracy of a machine learning model used in a vehicle from being reduced when a vehicle part is replaced.SOLUTION: A machine learning apparatus includes: an estimation unit 51 which estimates predetermined information by using a machine learning model; an update unit 52 which updates the machine learning model; a part information acquisition unit 53 which detects replacement of a vehicle part and acquires identification information of a vehicle part after the replacement. When a vehicle part relating to input data of the machine learning model is replaced with a vehicle part having a different configuration, the update unit receives a new machine learning model learned with a training dataset corresponding to the new vehicle part after the replacement from a server 2, and applies the new machine learning model to a vehicle.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 5

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: Provided is a machine learning system capable of acquiring new knowledge while suppressing a loss of old knowledge. The present invention configures a machine learning system comprising: a training data division unit that sorts training data into a first characteristic group and a second characteristic group; a first training process unit that trains with a first model by using the training data of the first characteristic group; a second training process unit that trains with a second model by using the training data of the second characteristic group; and a training process coupling unit that trains by combining training for the first training process unit with training for the second training process unit.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS
column13: A storage unit stores therein first inference results respectively corresponding to a plurality of face images, which are output from a first model of outputting a first inference result in response to an input of a face image. A processing unit selects, from the plurality of face images, first and second face images whose distance calculated based their first inference results exceeds a threshold. The processing unit performs machine learning to train a second model of outputting a second inference result in response to an input of a face image, using a third face image obtained by combining the first and second face images.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To create a highly accurate learning model even when using composite data.SOLUTION: A machine learning device stores a first learning model for outputting a feature quantity of input data, a second learning model for inputting the feature quantity output from the first learning model to output an identification error whether or not the data input to the first learning model is actual data, and a third learning model for inputting the identification error output from the second learning model to output generated data obtained by imparting features of the actual data to composite data. The machine learning device inputs the actual data, the composite data, and the generated data to the first learning model and performs machine learning of the second learning model on the basis of the output feature quantity. The machine learning device inputs the feature quantity output from the first learning model to the second learning model and performs machine learning of the third learning model on the basis of the output identification error. The machine learning device input the identification error output from the second learning model to the third learning model and performs machine learning of the first learning model on the basis of the output generated data.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 7

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: This machine learning device is provided with: a storage unit that stores image data indicating an image of an object captured by an imaging device; and a control unit that acquires behavior data indicating the amount of change in posture of the object viewed from the imaging device. The image data includes images of a plurality of frames in which the posture of the object changes according to the amount of change in the behavior data. The control unit acquires, in association with an image of at least one frame among the images of the plurality of frames in the image data, additional information indicating the posture of the object in the image. The control unit generates a trained estimation model by performing machine learning relating to the posture of the object in each of the plurality of frames on the basis of the behavior data, the image data, and the additional information. The estimation model calculates an estimated value of the posture of the object from the image of the object.

column12: Learning machine circuit and word learning machine
column13: The embodiment of the utility model provides a learning machine circuit and a word learning machine, and relates to the technical field of electronic learning equipment. The learning machine circuit comprises a power supply control module, a display driving module, an ink screen and a signal detection module, the power supply control module is electrically connected with the signal detection module and the display driving module; the display driving module is electrically connected with the ink screen; the display driving module is used for controlling the refresh frequency of the ink screen; wherein the signal detection module is used for acquiring an external signal; and the display driving module is also used for responding to an external signal and controlling the ink screen to perform full-screen refreshing according to the voltage output by the power supply control module. column12: Cooling device of learning machine and learning machine
column13: The utility model discloses a learning machine cooling device and a learning machine, the learning machine cooling device comprises a base, a heat conduction net plate used for heat dissipation of the learning machine is arranged in an installation frame, and a heat dissipation fan used for accelerating heat dissipation of the heat conduction net plate and heat dissipation fins is fixedly installed on the side portion of a support; through the design of the structures such as the heat conduction net plate, the cooling fins and the cooling fan, heat dissipated by the learning machine can be dissipated while heat dissipated by the learning machine is conducted through the heat conduction net plate, the heat conduction net plate can transmit the heat to the cooling fins, the heat conducted by the heat conduction net plate can be dissipated through the cooling fins, and the heat dissipation efficiency of the learning machine is improved. The heat dissipation speed of the heat conduction net plate can be increased, air can be blown to the heat conduction net plate and the cooling fins through the heat dissipation fan, the heat dissipation efficiency of the heat conduction net plate and the cooling fins can be further improved, the heat dissipation cooling efficiency of the learning machine can be improved through cooperation of multiple heat dissipation modes, and the heat dissipation functionality is high.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM
column13: The invention provides a machine learning device and a machine learning system which can suppress reduction in the precision of prediction of a machine learning model used in a vehicle from falling if a vehicle part is replaced. The machine learning device includes a predicting part (51) configured to use a machine learning model to predict predetermined information, an updating part (52) configured to update the machine learning model, and a part information acquiring part (53) configured to detect replacement of a vehicle part and acquire identification information of the vehicle part after replacement. The updating part is configured to receive a new machine learning model trained using training data sets corresponding to the vehicle part after replacement from a server and apply the new machine learning model to the vehicle, if a vehicle part relating to input data of the machine learning model is replaced with a vehicle part of a different configuration.

column13: The machine learning device includes a predicting part configured to use a machine learning model to predict predetermined information, an updating part configured to update the machine learning model, and a part information acquiring part configured to detect replacement of a vehicle part and acquire identification information of the vehicle part after replacement. The updating part is configured to receive a new machine learning model trained using training data sets corresponding to the vehicle part after replacement from a server and apply the new machine learning model to the vehicle, if a vehicle part relating to input data of the machine learning model is replaced with a vehicle part of a different configuration.

The template is integrated into a user interface where is may be executed.

column13: A machine learning method includes obtaining a first plurality of pieces of teacher data including encrypted words associated with first information indicating words received for search and encrypted words associated with second information indicating words used for search, generating a second plurality of pieces of teacher data in which a first encrypted word is replaced with a second encrypted word on the basis of the first plurality of pieces of teacher data, a plain text of the first encrypted word being equal to a plain text of the second encrypted word, and performing, on the basis of the second plurality of pieces of teacher data, machine learning of a parameter with which an encrypted word associated with the second information is determined in response to receiving an encrypted word associated with the first information.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS
column13: A machine learning apparatus includes a memory storing instructions and a processor that implements the stored instructions to execute a plurality of tasks. The tasks include an obtaining task that obtains a mixture signal containing a first component and a second component, a first generating task that generates a first signal that emphasize the first component inputting a mixture signal to a neural network, a second generating task that generates a second signal by modifying the first signal, a calculating task that calculates an evaluation index from the second signal, and a training task that trains the neural network with the evaluation index.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: The invention relates to a machine learning device and a machine learning method of relationship between inspection information during delivery and warning information during operation of an object. Amachine learning device which learns a correlation between shipment inspection information obtained by inspecting an object in shipment thereof and operation alarm information issued during operationof the object, includes a state observation unit which observes the shipment inspection information and the operation alarm information; and a learning unit which generates a learning model based onthe shipment inspection information and the operation alarm information observed by the state observation unit.

column12: Machine learning method and machine learning system
column13: A machine learning method performs training of values of model parameters forming a machine learning model, and is performed in a machine learning system including a vehicle having the machine learning model and a server able to communicate with the vehicle. The machine learning method includes: detecting, by the server, a current processing load of the server; determining, by the server, processing amounts of training respectively performed by the server and the vehicle, based on the processing load; performing, by the server, training of the values of the model parameters in accordance with the determined processing amount in the server; and performing, by the vehicle, training of the values of the model parameters in accordance with the determined processing amount in the vehicle. The server decreases a processing amount at the server when the processing load is relatively high compared to when it is relatively low.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning system determines whether an influence which exclusion and addition of evaluation target data from and to learning data has on the performance of a machine learning model includes: an acquisition unit that acquires an initial data group used to learn a learning model, evaluation target data added to, or excluded from, the initial data group, and a verification data group including at least one element which is not included in the evaluation target data; and a contribution degree calculation unit that calculates a contribution degree for evaluating an influence which the evaluation target data has on performance of the learning model, on the basis of an output value by the learning model for which the verification data group is input, and an output value by a relearning model which is learned by adding or excluding the evaluation target data to or from the initial data group.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To provide a machine learning system capable of further improving estimation of cause of an outlier and ensuring sufficient prediction accuracy.SOLUTION: A machine learning system 1 comprises an outlier detection unit 10 and a learning unit 20. The outlier detection unit 10 performs a first outlier detection process with an objective variable (for example, sales) as a detection target for all records, divides all the records into a plurality of groups based on explanatory variables, performs a second outlier detection process with the objective variable as the detection target for each group, and estimates cause of the outlier based on results of these two outlier detection processes. The learning unit 20 performs machine learning based on the results of estimating the cause of the outlier, and creates a learning model for predicting the objective variable.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS
column13: With respect to training data records in which combinations of data item values of data items are individually associated with label information, the data item values are converted based on a criterion per data item into discretized data values. Training processing for training a model that receives the discretized data values as input and performs determination about the label information is performed by using training data records obtained by the conversion. From an execution result of the training processing, feature data records, each of which differently indicates a combination of two or more data items for the determination among the data items, and index values, which indicate importance levels of the feature data records respectively, are acquired. The criterion for the discretization of the data item values is changed based on at least one of the feature data records having been selected based on the index values.

column12: Machine learning system and machine learning method
column13: A machine learning system includes a central device and several client devices. The client devices receive a central model from the central device respectively, and include a first and a second client device. The first and the second client device stores a first parameter set and a second parameter set, respectively, and perform training on the received central models according to the first parameter set and the second parameter set, respectively, so as to respectively generate a first and a second training results. Under the condition that the central device has received the first training result of an m<SP>th</SP> round training corresponding to the first client device and has not received a second training result of an n<SP>th</SP> round training corresponding to the second client device, when a difference between m and n is not higher than a threshold value, the central device updates the central model according to the first training result corresponding to the m<SP>th</SP> round training and without using the second training result corresponding to the n<SP>th</SP> round training.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM
column13: To provide a machine learning device and a machine learning program capable of preventing or suppressing the progress of overall learning from being hindered by a learning tendency of a specific task.SOLUTION: A machine learning device 100 includes a data acquisition unit 210, a learning unit 240, and an adjustment unit 250. The data acquisition unit 210 acquires learning data. The learning unit 240 machine-learns a learning model including a feature extraction unit 220 that extracts feature quantities from learning data and a plurality of classifiers that perform processing of a plurality of tasks based on the feature quantities by updating parameters of the classifiers by using the learning model. The adjustment unit 250 switches the classifier set as a learning target by the learning unit 240 among the plurality of classifiers.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS
column13: To provide a machine learning method capable of improving accuracy in predicting a position and a velocity of an object.SOLUTION: A machine learning method includes: a first process of inputting pieces of position data to a machine learning model configured to receive the pieces of position data each indicating a position of an object at a plurality of first points in time, and output occupancy data and flow data, the occupancy data indicating occupancy probability of the object at a second point in time, the flow data indicating a velocity vector of the object at the second point in time; a second process of generating second ground truth occupancy data by performing a process of expanding an occupancy region of the object on first ground truth occupancy data at the second point in time; a third process of calculating a loss parameter, based on the occupancy data, the second ground truth occupancy data, the flow data, and ground truth flow data at the second point in time; and a fourth process of updating the machine learning model, based on the loss parameter.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 12

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning system and a machine learning method capable of selecting a pretrained model to be used in transfer learning in a short time without actually executing the transfer learning includes a pretrained model acquisition unit which acquires a pretrained model from a pretrained model storage unit storing a plurality of pretrained models obtained by learning a transfer source task under respective conditions; a transfer learning dataset storage unit configured to store dataset related to a transfer target task; a pretrained model adaptability evaluation unit configured to evaluate adaptability of each pretrained model acquired by the pretrained model acquisition unit to the dataset related to the transfer target task; and a transfer learning unit configured to execute, based on an evaluation result of the pretrained model adaptability evaluation unit, transfer learning using a selected pretrained model and the dataset, and outputs a learning result as a trained model.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To adaptively select a parametrically-expressed state space and a non-parametrically-expressed state space.SOLUTION: A machine learning system (1) comprises: knowledge acquisition means (12) for generating a parametrically-expressed class set through reinforcement learning on the basis of a reward or penalty given to input and output to the input; knowledge reconstitution means (14) for generating a non-parametrically-expressed class set, on the basis of the learned input used for the generation of the parametrically-expressed class set; and knowledge utilization means (16) for performing class determination of determining to which of the non-parametrically-expressed classes unknown input belongs, and performing output corresponding to a result of the determination. The knowledge reconstitution means (14) generates the non-parametrically-expressed class set when the number of learned inputs is greater than a predetermined number and a variance of each of the parametrically-expressed classes is less than a predetermined value.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To acquire a high-accuracy common model while protecting concealing target data and an individual model.SOLUTION: A machine learning system has a server for holding a common model and a plurality of clients each for holding concealing target data and an individual model. The server transmits the common model to the plurality of clients. Each of the plurality of clients generates a learning result obtained by updating the common model based on its own concealing target data and its individual model, and transmits the generated learning result to the server. The server updates the common model based on the received learning result.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: This machine learning system includes: a server that holds a common model; and a plurality of clients, each of which holds data being concealed and an individual model. Each of the plurality of clients generates a learning result of updating the common model, on the basis of the data being concealed and the individual model held by the client, and transmits the generated learning result to the server. column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To provide a machine learning device, in which the dynamics that a machine learning unit has can be sufficiently brought out with a fewer number of measurements made.SOLUTION: The machine learning device is constituted by a general computing device that computes data and a reservoir computing device comprising an input unit, an output unit and one or more nodes. The reservoir computing device is designed to perform specific computation on data and computes the input value input from the input unit by dynamics of the nodes, each node i outputting a measured value zi(tk) at a time tk of day. The general computing device is designed to calculate y(tk)=Σizi(tk)wi and when so doing, adds the term zi(tk') at a time tk' of day, in addition to zi(tk) at the time tk of day. The calculation of y(tk) is made overlappingly utilizing zi(tk) at different times of day, so that the sum of subscript i falls within the range i=1 to qn.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 3

column12: MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning apparatus that learns an alarm factor in a motor drive device includes a state observation unit that obtains a feature amount as a state variable from the motor drive device and an alarm factor as label data, the alarm factor corresponding to the feature amount, and a learning unit that generates a learning model for inferring a new alarm factor corresponding to a new feature amount, from a dataset created on a basis of a combination of the state variable and the label data. The feature amount includes at least one of a detected current value detected from the motor, a speed command value specifying a rotational speed of the motor, an output voltage value output to the motor, an estimated speed value of the motor, and a detected speed value of the motor.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To enable acquisition of new knowledge while suppressing forgetfulness of old knowledge.SOLUTION: A machine learning system comprises: a learning data division unit 11 which distributes learning data to a first characteristic group and a second characteristic group; a first learning process unit 131 which learns with a first model by using the learning data of the first characteristic group; a second learning process unit 132 which learns with a second model by using the learning data of the second characteristic group; and a learning process coupling unit 133 which performs learning by combining the learning of the first learning process unit 131 and the learning of the second learning process unit 132.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column12: Machine learning system and machine learning method
Machine learning device and machine learning method
column13: The present invention obtains good performance even with a small amount of training data, by reducing time and labor required for collection of training data for use in learning. This machine learning device is provided with: an acquisition unit that acquires inference data and training data for use in machine learning; a learning unit that performs machine learning on the basis of the training data and a plurality of sets of learning parameters and generates a plurality of trained models; a model assessment unit that makes assessment of whether or not the learning results by the plurality of trained models are good and displays the assessment results; a model selection unit that can receive selection of a trained model; an inference calculation unit that performs inference calculation processing on the basis of at least some of the plurality of trained models and the inference data and generates inference result candidates; and an inference determination unit that outputs all or some of the inference result candidates or combinations thereof.

column12: MACHINE-LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE-LEARNING SYSTEM
column13: The purpose of the present invention is to provide a machine-learning device and a machine-learning system which can reduce the size of learning data and perform learning fast. The machine-learning device comprises: a machine-learning unit which learns learning data including images and labels for the images; an image processing unit which processes the images by using an image processing program; a small-size learning data creation unit which cuts off, from the image, a partial image to be used for learning by the machine-learning unit, and creates small-size learning data including the partial image; and a learning data control unit which stores the small-size learning data in association with the image processing program, wherein the machine-learning unit learns the learning data or the small-size learning data.

column12: Machine learning device and machine learning method
column13: A machine learning device includes a sparse modeling processing unit and a selection unit. The sparse modeling processing unit acquires individual importance degrees for each of explanatory variable candidates, the individual importance degrees being acquired by using respective sparse modeling methods different from each other, each of the sparse modeling methods taking input data including a specified objective variable in a learning model used for industrial activity and the explanatory variable candidates that are candidates for an explanatory variable for explaining the specified objective variable. The selection unit calculates a comprehensive importance degree for each of the explanatory variable candidates based on the individual importance degrees of each of the explanatory variable candidates, and selects an explanatory variable of the learning model from among the explanatory variable candidates based on the comprehensive importance degree.

column13: To provide a machine learning device in which the accuracy of detecting an abnormality in an object to be detected can be enhanced.SOLUTION: A machine learning device according to one embodiment of the present disclosure includes: a smoothing circuit that can generate second flag data by performing a smoothing process on first flag data which is time-series data indicating whether or not an abnormality has occurred in an object to be detected and corresponding to a plurality of measurement data sets which are time-series data about a plurality of parameters of the object to be detected; and a machine learning circuit that can perform a machine learning process by performing a regression analysis in such a way that when the plurality of measurement data sets are inputted to a machine learning model which is configured to output two or more measurement data sets of the plurality of measurement data sets in response to input of the plurality of measurement data sets, a prediction value corresponding to two or more measurement data outputted from the machine learning model becomes equal to the second flag data.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

column13: To properly carry out learning with a convolutional neural network (CNN) while avoiding loss or disappearance of features of a target object.SOLUTION: A machine learning apparatus is configured to extract features of target data using CNN, to perform learning on the target data, the CNN including: a first convolutional layer configured to differentiate features of the target data; a second convolutional layer configured to increase the amount of information from the differentiated target data; a max pooling layer configured to compress the target data with increased amount of information, other than the maximum value; an upsampling layer configured to increase the size of the compressed target data for upsampling; a third convolutional layer configured to convert the upsampled target data to target data of a predetermined number of channels; and a fourth convolutional layer configured to directly convert the target data prior to the first convolutional layer to the target data of the predetermined number of channels and add the target data after the third convolutional layer and the target data after the fourth convolutional layer.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 4

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To reduce a calculation amount necessary for learning in machine learning.SOLUTION: An activation state decision unit 100 that changes data on the basis of a parameter and that processes and outputs the data includes a plurality of parameter units 120 made to process the data on the basis of parameters respectively managed thereby. Each of the plurality of parameter units 120 includes a numerical number generator 300 that generates a numerical number a sign of which varies, a number processor (such as an adder 180) that creates a parameter to process the data on the basis of the parameter and the numerical number generated by the numerical number generator, and a parameter updating unit 400 that updates the parameter on the basis of an evaluation value, which is acquired by evaluation of the processed data by an evaluation system, and the numerical number generated by the numerical number generator. The numerical number generator 300 changes the generated numerical number in each data processing, and generates the numerical number in such a manner that order of a sign variation of the numerical number varies between the parameter units.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 8

column12: Machine learning method and machine learning device
column13: The invention provides a machine learning method and a machine learning device. The machine learning method includes the steps: constructing an original input matrix and an original output matrix according to an acquired training sample set; constructing a mapping feature node matrix based on the original input matrix by using a first random weight and a first random number; constructing an enhanced node matrix based on the mapping feature node matrix by using a second random weight and a second random number; and according to an augmented matrix composed of the mapping feature node matrix andthe enhanced node matrix and the original output matrix, determining to connect the weight matrix. In the machine learning method and the machine learning device of the present invention, not only the factor of direct connection between the input layer and the output layer in the neural network is added, but also more factors of the hidden layer between the input layer and the output layer is added, so that the machine learning method and the machine learning device have the advantages of satisfying the computational efficiency and guaranteeing the learning accuracy of a wide learning method.

column13: To make it possible to optimize parameters related to a model and a learning method with a simple operation without spending time even when lacking specialized knowledge about model features and system operations in performing machine learning with given training data, so as to solve the problem by performing appropriate learning.SOLUTION: A machine learning device for performing, based on training data, learning by building a learning model sets a parameter related to a structure of the learning model or a learning way for each learning, inputs training data, and performs a learning process based on the parameter. Then, an evaluation value for evaluating a learning result is calculated. The learning process is interrupted when the evaluation value does not reach a predetermined threshold value in the latest predetermined number of times of learning, and the evaluation value for evaluating the learning result, the parameter related to the learning, and a procedure to be performed for a user are output.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 4

A training processing unit causes a machine learning model, which outputs second feature amount data for processing by using first feature amount data for processing as an input, to be trained using the statistical data as training data.

column12: Machine learning method, and machine learning device
column13: This machine learning method includes performing: dataset splitting processing for dividing a period into a learning period and a validation period, and splitting a dataset into learning data and validation data; learning candidate period division processing for dividing a learning candidate period into a plurality of split learning periods; learning period evaluation processing for generating a learning period evaluation model for each split learning period, using a learning model corresponding to the split learning period, and using the verification data to calculate an evaluation index of the learning period evaluation model for each split learning period; learning period selection processing for repeating the learning candidate period division processing and the learning period evaluation processing until a predetermined end condition is satisfied, and when the end condition is satisfied, selecting a split learning period having a high evaluation index as a learning target period; and model output processing for outputting a learning model obtained by performing machine learning employing the learning data corresponding to the learning target period.

column12: MACHINE-LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE-LEARNING APPARATUS
column13: A machine-learning method includes: a data-set division process of separating a period into a learning period and a validation period, and dividing data set into learning data and validation data; a learning-candidate-period separating process of separating learning candidate period into a plurality of divided learning periods; a learning-period evaluation process of generating a learning-period evaluation model for each divided learning period using learning data corresponding to the divided learning periods, and calculating an evaluation index of the learning-period evaluation model for each divided learning period; a learning-period selection process of repeatedly performing the learning-candidate-period separating process and the learning-period evaluation process until a predetermined termination condition is satisfied, and selecting a divided learning period having a high evaluation index as a learning target period when the termination condition is satisfied; and a model output process of outputting the learning model on which machine learning has been performed using the learning data corresponding to the learning target period.

column12: Machine learning apparatus and machine learning method
column13: According to the invention, time and labor consumed by collection of training data for learning are reduced, and better efficiency can be obtained even with less training data. A machine learning device is provided with: an acquisition unit that acquires training data and inference data for machine learning; a learning unit that performs machine learning on the basis of the training data and a plurality of sets of learning parameters and generates a plurality of learned models; a model evaluation unit that evaluates the quality of the learning results of the plurality of learned models and displays the evaluation results; a model selection unit capable of accepting selection of a learned model; an inference calculation unit that performs an inference calculation process on the basis of at least some of the plurality of learned models and the inference data, and generates an inference result candidate; and an inference determination unit that outputs all or some of the inference result candidates or a combination thereof.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM
column13: To suppress a processing load of a server from becoming excessively high.SOLUTION: A machine learning method for performing machine learning of values of model parameters that is performed in a machine learning system 1 including a vehicle 2 having a machine learning model and a server 3 able to communicate with the vehicle includes: detecting, by the server, a current processing load of the server; determining, by the server, processing amounts of the machine learning respectively performed by the server and the vehicle, based on the processing load; performing, by the server, the machine learning of the values of the model parameters in accordance with the determined processing amount of the machine learning in the server; and performing, by the vehicle, the machine learning of the values of the model parameters in accordance with the determined processing amount of the machine learning in the vehicle. The server decreases a processing amount of the machine learning in the server when the processing load is relatively high compared to when it is relatively low.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 7

The machine learning method employs a training method which uses an operation by DFA, and differentiation information f'(x) of a nonlinear function f(x) is replaced by an arbitrary nonlinear mapping g(x) in an update rule of an operation by a DFA operation, and a value of a linear combination is updated by using the arbitrary nonlinear mapping g(x) and a linear random mapping B(l)e(L) of an error signal of a final layer. There is also provided a machine learning device for equipping the machine learning method.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning system includes a display device and a learning device. The learning device causes a variable selection section in a learning execution screen of the display device to display a result of extracting candidate explanatory variables and candidate objective variables from a target file designated by a user. The learning device causes a result display section in the learning execution screen to display a result of analyzing, by machine learning, a relation between an explanatory variable and an objective variable selected by the user from among the candidate explanatory variables and the candidate objective variables displayed in the variable selection section.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning device includes a sparse modeling processing unit and a selection unit. The sparse modeling processing unit acquires individual importance degrees for each of explanatory variable candidates, the individual importance degrees being acquired by using respective sparse modeling methods different from each other, each of the sparse modeling methods taking input data including a specified objective variable in a learning model used for industrial activity and the explanatory variable candidates that are candidates for an explanatory variable for explaining the specified objective variable. The selection unit calculates a comprehensive importance degree for each of the explanatory variable candidates based on the individual importance degrees of each of the explanatory variable candidates, and selects an explanatory variable of the learning model from among the explanatory variable candidates based on the comprehensive importance degree.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE
column13: To appropriately train a neural network enhancing a specific component in a mixed signal.SOLUTION: A machine learning device comprises: a component enhancement unit 21 for generating an acoustic signal Y where a first component is enhanced, by applying a neural network N to an acoustic signal X containing the first component and a second component; a signal processing unit 22 for generating an acoustic signal Z by processing the acoustic signal Y; and a learning processing unit 30 for training the neural network N according to an evaluation index calculated from the acoustic signal Z.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 13

column12: Learning machine method for the blind and learning machine
column13: The invention discloses a learning machine method for the blind and a learning machine. The method includes: encoding information and braille information of a learning card are obtained, wherein braille is arranged on one side of the learning card; and according to the encoding information and the braille information, the voice information of the braille is determined. Therefore, voice informationcorresponding to the braille is obtained by touching the Braille on the learning card, so that the blind people can learn the braille on the learning card by the learning machine.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING APPARATUS AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning apparatus includes an analytical information storage unit that stores therein two or more pieces of analytical information each associating input/output information used for machine learning with time-point information indicating a time point of the input/output information, an analysis-object-set specifying unit that specifies an analysis object set containing a unit-period input-output set being a set of pieces of the input/output information corresponding to pieces of the time-point information indicating the time point in a unit period and an amount of the pieces of the input/output information of the set being dependent on a period between the time point of the unit periods and a specific time point, and a machine learning unit that performs machine learning by using the pieces of the input/output information contained in the analysis object set.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: To provide a machine learning system and a machine learning method that can select a pre-trained model for use in transition learning in a short time without actually performing the transition learning.SOLUTION: A machine learning system of the present invention includes a pre-trained model acquisition unit that acquires at least one pre-trained model from a pre-trained model storage unit that stores a plurality of pre-trained models obtained by learning tasks of transition sources at respective conditions, a transition learning data set storage unit that stores a data set about the tasks of a transition destination, a pre-trained model fitness evaluation unit that evaluates a fitness for the pre-trained model acquired by the pre-trained model acquisition unit, and a transition learning unit that performs transition learning using the selected pre-trained model and the data set based on an evaluation result by the pre-trained model fitness evaluation unit and outputs a learning result as a trained model.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

column12: MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE AND MACHINE LEARNING METHOD
column13: A machine learning device includes a general arithmetic device that calculates data, and a reservoir arithmetic device including an input unit, an output unit, and one or more nodes. The reservoir arithmetic device performs a certain calculation on data and performs calculation in response to an input value input through an input unit using the dynamics of the nodes. Each node i outputs a measurement outcome zi(tk) at a time point tk. The general arithmetic device calculates y(tk)=Σizi(tk)wi. In the calculation of y(tk), in addition to zi(tk) at the time point zi(tk), the term zi(tk′) at a time point tk′ (tk′≠tk) is included. Thus, the calculation of y(tk) is performed by redundantly using zi(tk) at different time points, with the range of sum with respect to the subscript i being i=1, . . . qn, where q is redundancy.

column12: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD AND MACHINE LEARNING DEVICE
column13: To provide a machine learning method that can improve the performance of a learning model by machine learning.SOLUTION: A machine learning method includes machine learning of a learning model using a data set composed of data at respective points of time in a predetermined period. The machine learning method comprises: data set dividing processing of sectioning a period into a learning period and a verification period, and dividing the data set into learning data and verification data; learning candidate period sectioning processing of sectioning a learning candidate period into a plurality of divided learning periods; learning period evaluation processing of using learning data corresponding to the divided learning periods to generate learning period evaluation model for each divided learning period, and using the verification data to calculate an evaluation index of the learning period evaluation model for each divided learning period; learning period selecting processing of repeatedly performing the learning candidate period sectioning processing and the learning period evaluating processing until predetermined end conditions are met, and selecting a divided learning period with a high evaluation index as a learning object period when the predetermined conditions are met; and model output processing of outputting a learning model having machine learning completed using learning data corresponding to the learning object period.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1
